Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: Creator, Writer And Producer Danita Patterson Joins The Rico No Suave Show!We were blessed to have such a great and talented producer on the show with us! Danita brings excellence from her hard work. She talks about the struggles in the industry and what you need to look out for and how to succeed in the industry. She also talks about how she is helping the community from youth to adults!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Danita Patterson

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Danita Patterson
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Danita Patterson
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Danita Patterson

Video.summary: The Epic Rico No Suave Show With Celebrity Film Producer Carlos Moreno Jr!What a great Interview with Carlos, we take a deep dive into the journey of film directing and producing his show Pepitos America and Pepitos Mamadas. We also take a look at the greatness of how carlos becase that actor in the industry and who mentored him as well!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Carlos Moreno Jr

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Carlos Moreno Jr
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Carlos Moreno Jr
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Carlos Moreno Jr

Video.summary: Do you feel both captivated and exhausted by city life? Are the conveniences worth the chaos? In this episode of the Rooted in Wellness podcast, join me, Wade Lightheart, and Matt Gallant as we explore the challenges of maintaining balance in busy urban environments and the serene contrast of ashram life.
Video.title: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Image.alt: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Video.summary: Have you wondered how to biohack your health as a woman? Taking control to live your best life is what we dive into in this episode with guest Aggie Lal.
Video.title: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Image.alt: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Video.summary: Sparsh Shah, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - SPARSH SHAH

Video.summary: Mary Morrissey, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Bob Proctor and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Mary Morrissey

Video.summary: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Video.summary: If you had a chance to close Shawn, could you get it done? Today's the day we see who has the goods. Each team has one goal. Get the contract signed. Shawn is not going to make it easy, but often your audience isn't the hardest part. Sometimes getting out of your own way is the biggest challenge. Prepare to witness a pitch fest for the ages. You'll see that it doesn't matter what you're selling - a Yacht, a Ferrari, a Private Jet...or a Potato - if you don't connect with Shawn, you have no chance.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Video.summary: Loss can make you feel powerless, but grief is your work and your power. David Kessler guides you to grieve fully on your terms, honor your unique process, and reclaim agency over your healing, showing that you can live fully while holding your pain with strength.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3

Video.summary: Your survival mind is wired to protect you from pain, but after loss it can spiral into worry and worst-case thinking. Learn the science of grief, how repetitive thoughts form deep mental pathways, and how to rewire your mind to heal and grow.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4

Video.summary: Trauma overwhelms the heart and mind, but healing requires grief. This lesson guides you to honor your triggers as maps of pain and recovery, reclaim choice in how you live with trauma, and create space for healing while moving through grief with awareness and care.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5

Video.summary: Step into Intentional Creation using your Core Desired Feelings as your guide. Align actions with heart-centered intentions, release what no longer serves you, and transform your goals into sacred desires. Cultivate agency, joy, and flow as your inner world shapes your outer reality.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3

Image.alt: The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3

Video.summary: Integrate your Core Desired Feelings through daily practice, reflection, and heart-centered rituals. Using mindfulness, breath, and prayer, cultivate sacred connection, peace, and purpose. Return to your heart each day, and let your love and clarity ripple into the world.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: The Desire Map Part 4

Video.summary: Self-confidence is sexy, but how do you get it? Plus, what happens in Vegas doesn't stay in Vegas. Avoiding sexually transmitted infections after casual sex on vacation. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation
Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation
Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation

Video.summary: Ever have the post-sex blues? You aren’t alone. Plus, why cheating isn’t always about sex. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?
Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?
Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?

Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics
Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics
Pull Up The Curtain - Ali of The St. Lunatics

Video.summary: DR. ANTHONY GONZALEZ - Obesity JASON MELAND - Sports Medicine DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preventing Infections Post-Surgery
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E23

Video.summary: NATALIE CASTRO & IVAN SAAVEDRA - Nutrition & Healthy Living DR. GEOFFREY YOUNG, DR. GUILHERME RABINOWITS, & DR. RAMON JIMENEZ - Melanoma Skin Cancer DR. DANIEL CAREAGA - Plastic Surgery
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E24

Video.summary: ELIZABETH REINHARDT - Influenza DR. JOSE MENA - Scoliosis JOANN SANTIAGO-CHARLES - Women & Arthritis
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E25

Video.summary: DR. TED FELDMAN - Heart Health Myths & Facts DR. MICHAEL WEITZ & LINDA KASYAN - Living with Arthritis NICOLE RODRIGUEZ & AMY EXUM - Chronic Pain’s Effect on Mental Health
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E26

Video.summary: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. Build on yesterday’s practice to marry effort with ease. Invite your breath to be smooth and even as we continue to build on your foundation.
Video.title: Day 5: Stability

Video.summary: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.
Video.title: Day 6: Clarity

Video.summary: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.
Video.title: Day 7: Prana

Video.summary: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.
Video.title: Day 9: Bold

Video.summary: Your day 10 practice starts with a standing warm up and eases into a yoga flow for balance and transformation! Bring calm alertness to the mind and body as you continue to ride the wave of the breath. Build a strong foundation to set yourself up for greatness. Be patient and courageous.
Video.title: Day 10: Balance
